description: A photograph depicting a hilly, semi-arid landscape. The foreground and mid-ground feature dense, green, broadleaf forest or shrubland vegetation, forming a continuous canopy. In the background, the hills appear drier and lighter brown, covered with widely scattered, smaller trees or shrubs, suggestive of olive groves or degraded dryland vegetation. The image captures a transition between different land cover types within a hilly terrain, likely in a Mediterranean climate.
